title: Need Card
description: One thing a guest could do — a need, with the place that meets it and why it fits.
whenToUse: Show one thing I could do here — a need like 'dinner with fountain views' with the place that meets it and why it fits me. Stream one card per idea so a landscape of options builds up; each expands to full detail and can join a plan. Not a list container (one idea per card), and not for asking the guest questions.
